title: Sabash
desc: Srinivasan, a man who is blind, and his friend Dharan discover the body of Cheenu's wife, Shanti. Initially, the police regard it as a suicide but new evidence suggests foul play.

title: Kadal Pookkal
desc: Two friends, Karuthaiya and Peter, find their bond tested when a personal tragedy strikes one of their families, leading them on a quest for justice.

title: Kasthuri Maan
desc: Arun, a district collector, promises to marry Uma who helped him pass his IAS exams. Things take a bad turn when Uma ends up in jail, unsure about her future and their relationship.

title: Kasthuri Maan
desc: Arun, a district collector, promises to marry Uma who helped him pass his IAS exams. Things take a bad turn when Uma ends up in jail, unsure about her future and their relationship.

title: Thedinen Vanthathu
desc: A man and his friend try to save a bag containing a hefty sum, which they hide in an empty house. When they return for the bag, the house is occupied by a girl and her family.

title: Kadal Pookkal
desc: Two friends, Karuthaiya and Peter, find their bond tested when a personal tragedy strikes one of their families, leading them on a quest for justice.

title: Musthaffaa
desc: Periyavar's right-hand man Mustaffa and Kavita, a dancer, are set to get married. After Kavita's boss Kaaliya murders her, Mustaffa resolves to seek vengeance.

title: Pudhu Nellu Pudhu Nathu
desc: An old widow returns to her village with her two sons. The elder son is an illiterate peasant, the younger an educated, urbane youth, who falls in love with an iron-fisted local landlord's daughter.

title: December Pookal
desc: Annam Poornima, a journalist, is in love with Chandru, an artist who tragically lost his wife. However, a police officer suspects Annam may be the next victim of a serial killer.

title: Ulavuthurai
desc: Vasanth Periyasamy, a naval officer, is assigned to investigate the mysterious deaths at the sea. To protect his family, he assumes the identity of a car driver.
